header.title: Daily FI Tape - Market Briefing
header.as_of_note: Session briefing with Asia / Pre-market shown separately.

bullets: UST yields finished the session modestly higher with the long end leading the move.
Credit spreads stayed contained, keeping the move framed as rates-led rather than stress-led.
The dollar held firm into the close, reinforcing the cross-asset read-through.
overall_summary.ny_close_causal_narrative: The session narrative was a rates-led bear-steepening supported by supply concession and policy-sensitive repricing, while credit stress remained contained.

top_drivers.title: Long-end supply concession
top_drivers.short_summary: The 10Y sector underperformed as the session priced more term-premium concession.
top_drivers.detail: The move links to supply absorption rather than a late-session risk shock.
top_drivers.market_move: The 10Y sector underperformed as the session close priced more term-premium concession.
top_drivers.transmission: Supply-sensitive duration pricing steepened the curve without turning the session into broad credit stress.
top_drivers.confirmation: Auction demand and front-end repricing would decide whether the concession persists.

top_drivers.title: Policy-sensitive repricing
top_drivers.short_summary: Front-end rates rose modestly as the path of easing stayed conditional.
top_drivers.detail: The move was directional but not disorderly, leaving the curve steeper into close.
top_drivers.market_move: Front-end rates rose modestly while the path of easing stayed conditional.
top_drivers.transmission: Policy uncertainty kept front-end relief limited and left the curve steeper into the close.
top_drivers.confirmation: A data or Fed communication surprise would need to pull the front end in the same direction.

top_drivers.title: Contained credit stress
top_drivers.short_summary: Tighter IG spreads kept the session from reading as broad risk-off.
top_drivers.detail: Credit resilience narrowed the interpretation toward rates and supply rather than funding stress.
top_drivers.market_move: IG spread tone stayed contained even as rates drove the session.
top_drivers.transmission: Spread tone translated the rate move into a selective, not systemic, credit read.
top_drivers.confirmation: HY spreads and funding-sensitive credits would need to weaken to challenge that read.

watch_events.title: US retail sales
watch_events.watch_line: Demand data tests whether the rates rally has macro follow-through.
watch_events.market_trigger: A retail-sales surprise that changes the growth and inflation mix.
watch_events.market_implication: Strong demand would pressure duration; weak demand would extend the rates bid.
watch_events.why_it_matters: The print is the next macro check on whether demand keeps the Fed path conditional.
watch_events.confirms_if: Demand or labor data prints in line with the current rates read.
watch_events.challenges_if: A demand surprise reverses the current front-end or dollar signal.

watch_events.title: Treasury coupon supply
watch_events.watch_line: Auction demand checks whether term-premium concession is enough.
watch_events.market_trigger: Weak tails, lower bid-to-cover, or dealer-heavy takedown.
watch_events.market_implication: Weak demand revives term-premium pressure; strong demand validates duration appetite.
watch_events.why_it_matters: Auction demand will test whether the latest term-premium concession is sufficient.
watch_events.confirms_if: Firm demand clears supply without extra concession.
watch_events.challenges_if: Weak tails or dealer-heavy takedown revive term-premium pressure.

long_thesis.english_markdown:
# Market Thesis

## Session Narrative

UST yields ended the session modestly higher as the curve bear-steepened, the dollar held firm, and credit spreads stayed contained. The session read stays rates-led rather than broad stress-led.

## Market Drivers

1. Policy repricing: the NY close snapshot anchors the fixture market read.
2. Supply concession: fixture source notes keep supply as context, not a standalone yield explanation.
3. morning update: the early update stays separate from the NY close thesis.

## Latest Asia / Pre-market Update

Separately, early Asia trading showed steadier Treasury futures and a softer dollar tone before the Taipei 08:00 cutoff. This update is a separate forward-looking market check.

## Market Watch

- US retail sales (2026-01-16): A demand surprise could affect the front-end rates path and dollar direction.
- Treasury coupon supply (2026-01-20): Auction demand will test whether the latest term-premium concession is sufficient.
